name: claudebook
description: Generate and maintain a layered, AI-friendly documentation system (CLAUDE.md router + .claude/docs/) so Claude loads only the docs relevant to the current task and reuses existing components instead of recreating them.
author: Yatharth Lakhera

commands.name: write
commands.description: Bootstrap the full claudebook documentation system for a new project.

commands.name: revise
commands.description: Incrementally update claudebook docs based on git changes since the last write/revise.
